property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: targetContactField
property.label: Target Contact Field
property.description: The name of the contact field to be linked to from the current object

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showQuickSearch
property.label: Show Quick Search
property.description: Show Quick Search

property.name: quickSearchKeyFields
property.label: Quick Search Key Fields
property.description: The Quick Search key to match the shown Individual Achievement.

property.name: individualAchievementGroupByField
property.label: Individual Achievement Group By Field
property.description: The field to group the same type of Individual Achievements

property.name: individualAchievementTitleFormat
property.label: Individual Achievement Title Format
property.description: The merge field format to display as the title. Support fields are fields from Individual Achievement. Eg: "{Name}"

property.name: individualAchievementSubtitleFormat
property.label: Individual Achievement Subtitle Format
property.description: The merge field format to display as the subtitle. Support fields are fields from Individual Achievement. Eg: "{Name}"

property.name: individualAchievementInfoFields1
property.label: Individual Achievement Info Fields 1
property.description: The additional fields to display on the first section in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c..

property.name: individualAchievementInfoFields2
property.label: Individual Achievement Info Fields 2
property.description: The additional fields to display on the second section in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c..

property.name: showVerificationIndicator
property.label: Show Verification Indicator
property.description: To show the verification status badge.

property.name: showNewButton
property.label: Show New Button
property.description: Show the new button.

property.name: showViewButton
property.label: Show View Button
property.description: To show the View button with action required indicator.

property.name: showDeleteButton
property.label: Show Delete Button
property.description: Show the delete button. Respect the Locking Mode of the individual achievement record.

property.name: individualAchievementPrecreationFieldSet
property.label: Individual Achievement Precreation Field Set
property.description: The field set to be rendered in the new record creation screen.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Enable Debug Mode
property.description: Enable Debug Mode

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: targetContactField
property.label: Target Contact Field
property.description: The name of the contact field to be linked to from the current object

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showQuickSearch
property.label: Show Quick Search
property.description: Show Quick Search

property.name: quickSearchKeyFields
property.label: Quick Search Key Fields
property.description: The Quick Search key to match the shown Individual Achievement.

property.name: individualAchievementGroupByField
property.label: Individual Achievement Group By Field
property.description: The field to group the same type of Individual Achievements

property.name: individualAchievementTitleFormat
property.label: Individual Achievement Title Format
property.description: The merge field format to display as the title. Support fields are fields from Individual Achievement. Eg: "{Name}"

property.name: individualAchievementSubtitleFormat
property.label: Individual Achievement Subtitle Format
property.description: The merge field format to display as the subtitle. Support fields are fields from Individual Achievement. Eg: "{Name}"

property.name: individualAchievementInfoFields1
property.label: Individual Achievement Info Fields 1
property.description: The additional fields to display on the first section in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c..

property.name: individualAchievementInfoFields2
property.label: Individual Achievement Info Fields 2
property.description: The additional fields to display on the second section in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c..

property.name: showVerificationIndicator
property.label: Show Verification Indicator
property.description: To show the verification status badge.

property.name: showNewButton
property.label: Show New Button
property.description: Show the new button.

property.name: showViewButton
property.label: Show View Button
property.description: To show the Review button with action required indicator.

property.name: showDeleteButton
property.label: Show Delete Button
property.description: Show the delete button. Respect the Locking Mode of the individual achievement record.

property.name: individualAchievementPrecreationFieldSet
property.label: Individual Achievement Precreation Field Set
property.description: The field set to be rendered in the new record creation screen.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Enable Debug Mode
property.description: Enable Debug Mode
